cc:work.dc:title: MapChart Map
cc:work.dc:description: This map was created with MapChart.net, a website for creating custom maps.

path.style: stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); filter: none; fill: rgb(209, 219, 221); stroke-width: 0.68;
stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); filter: none; fill: rgb(209, 219, 221); stroke-width: 0.68;
stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); filter: none; fill: rgb(209, 219, 221); stroke-width: 0.68;
stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); filter: none; fill: rgb(209, 219, 221); stroke-width: 0.68;

g.style: font-family: "Century Gothic"; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0);
